response:
```sql
SELECT
    g.government_form,
    SUM(c.population) AS total_population
FROM
    world_1.country c
JOIN
    world_1.government g ON c.country_code = g.country_code
WHERE
    g.government_form IN (
        SELECT government_form
        FROM world_1.government
        WHERE
            AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM life_expectancy)) > 72
            GROUP BY government_form
    )
GROUP BY
    g.government_form;
```
